assertions.evidence: i18n/routing.ts uses 'import { defineRouting } from "next-intl/routing"'. Correct v3 API.
middleware.ts uses 'import createMiddleware from "next-intl/middleware"' and 'export default createMiddleware(routing)'.
src/navigation.ts uses createNavigation(routing). Section 10 says 'En lugar de next/link, usa el Link de tu navigation.ts'. Correct guidance.
app/[locale]/layout.tsx has NextIntlClientProvider with messages from getMessages(). Correct location and API.

Step 8 shows page.tsx using 'import { useTranslations } from "next-intl"' in what appears to be a Server Component (no 'use client' directive). This confuses the distinction. While getTranslations is used in generateMetadata, the page component itself uses the client hook.
